import static java.lang.System.Logger.Level.ERROR;

import java.lang.System.Logger;
import java.lang.System.Logger.Level;

// Only ERROR and WARNING report - the mirror of slf4j's error/warn-only
// tier-1: a DEBUG/INFO line plus swallow is a soft swallow. A level the
// source can't prove constant (a variable, a bare static-imported name)
// fails closed.
class SystemLoggerSoftSwallow {
    private static final Logger log = System.getLogger("x");

    void debugSwallows() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            log.log(Level.DEBUG, "failed", e);
        }
    }

    void infoSwallows() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            log.log(Level.INFO, "failed", e);
        }
    }

    void variableLevelFailsClosed() {
        Level lvl = Level.ERROR;
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            log.log(lvl, "failed", e);
        }
    }

    void bareStaticImportFailsClosed() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            log.log(ERROR, "failed", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
